roofer."}]]}]]}],["$","nav",null,{"className":"breadcrumb","aria-label":"Breadcrumb","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","children":"Home"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"sep","children":"/"}],["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/guides","children":"Guides"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"sep","children":"/"}],"Roof reveal","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"guide-meta","children":"D.T Roofing \\u00b7 Brandon, MB"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"lead","children":"A leak or some storm damage doesn\\u2019t always mean a new roof. Here\\u2019s how we decide between a repair and a replacement \\u2014 and how you can tell which one you\\u2019re probably looking at."}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"When a repair makes sense"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"If the damage is localized and the rest of the roof is in good shape, a repair is usually the right call. Good signs for a repair:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"A handful of shingles lost to wind, in one area"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"An isolated leak around a vent, chimney or valley"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"A roof that\\u2019s still relatively young, with shingles that are still sealed down"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Flashing that\\u2019s come loose but is otherwise sound"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["For a standard shingle repair we charge a flat ",["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/roof-repair","children":"$$274.39 plus GST"}]," \\u2014 one hour on site plus a bundle of shingles \\u2014 with extra time billed hourly and ridge cap or flashing extra. You can book one online without playing phone tag."]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"When a patch won\\u2019t hold"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The thing most homeowners can\\u2019t see from the ground is whether the shingles around the damage have lost their seal. Once that seal is gone, a patch won\\u2019t survive the next big prairie wind \\u2014 and you\\u2019ve paid twice. That\\u2019s the moment a repair stops being worth it."}],"$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d"]}]}]}],"$L1e"]}]],null,"$L1f"]}]

19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Lean toward replacement when:"}]
1a:["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"Shingles are brittle, curling or losing granules across the whole roof"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"You\\u2019ve had leaks in more than one spot"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"The roof is near the end of its life and you\\u2019d be patching every year"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"A storm has bruised or cracked shingles over a wide area"}]]}]
1b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Storm and hail damage"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Hail damage often isn\\u2019t obvious from the ground, so after a confirmed storm \\u2014 especially on a roof over 15 years old \\u2014 it\\u2019s worth a proper look. If the damage is real, we document it the right way and can help you through your ",["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/insurance-claims","children":"insurance claim"}],". Our ",["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/inspections","children":"roof inspections"}]," page has more on what we check."]}]
1d:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout","children":["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"The bottom line:"}]," we\\u2019ll tell you straight which one you need. If a repair will genuinely do the job, we\\u2019ll do that instead of selling you a roof you don\\u2019t need. If it won\\u2019t hold, we\\u2019ll say so \\u2014 and why."]}]}]
